summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SKU Cascading Filters feature. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All 9 frontend UI tests passed. The cascading filter functionality works correctly on both SKUs page and Production page.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 709 SKUs with vertical/model/brand data
context_for_next_testing_agent: SKU cascading filters fully implemented and working. 709 SKUs with verticals: Scooter (306), Rideon (137), Tricycle (143), Walker (65), Electric Rideon (54), Accessories (2), Shakers (1), temp (1). Production page shows '0 SKUs available' because no SKUs are activated for 'Unit 1 Vedica' branch - this is expected behavior.

features_tested.api_skus_filter_options: PASS - Returns verticals, models, brands arrays correctly
features_tested.api_skus_models_by_vertical: PASS - Returns models specific to selected vertical
features_tested.api_skus_brands_by_vertical_model: PASS - Returns brands for vertical+model combination
features_tested.api_skus_filtered: PASS - Filters SKUs by vertical, model, brand, search, branch
features_tested.skus_page_vertical_buttons: PASS - Vertical filter buttons appear with counts (All 709, Scooter 306, etc.)
features_tested.skus_page_model_filter_row: PASS - Model filter row appears when vertical selected
features_tested.skus_page_brand_filter_row: PASS - Brand filter row appears when vertical selected
features_tested.production_page_quick_filters: PASS - Quick Filters section with vertical buttons
features_tested.production_dialog_cascading_filters: PASS - Vertical/Model/Brand dropdowns work with cascading logic
features_tested.production_dialog_sku_dropdown_updates: PASS - SKU dropdown updates based on filter selection (shows 0 for branch without activated SKUs)
